chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1273 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on CMA 4988/25 3.For hearing of main case 10-09-2025 Mr. Yameen Ali Khoso, Advocate for the petitioners. **** Counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
